summary: PR #2458 made a small matching improvement to Pikachu Thunder item spawn function it_802B1DF8 by changing local variable declaration order and lifetimes in src/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.c. The PR body reports improved text similarity for the itpikachuthunder unit and function while preserving the 464-byte function size.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; adjusted local declarations in it_802B1DF8, the Pikachu Thunder spawn function.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.c added 7 deleted 7 hunks 2
raw_diff: declarations in it_802B1DF8 reordered and moved between function scope and loop/if block scope
pr_body: Small matching improvement for it_802B1DF8 in itpikachuthunder.c

what_changed.text: Removed function-scope declarations for int i, Item* ip, and itPikachuthunderAttributes* attrs from the top of it_802B1DF8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed top-scope int i, Item* ip, itPikachuthunderAttributes* attrs

what_changed.text: Added function-scope declarations for Item_GObj* first and Item_GObj* item_gobj earlier in the local list, then placed int i later after prev.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added Item_GObj* first, Item_GObj* item_gobj near x40 and moved int i after prev

what_changed.text: Changed the loop body from declaring Item_GObj* item_gobj inside the for loop initializer statement to assigning to the predeclared item_gobj.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item_GObj* item_gobj = Item_80268B18(&spawn) became item_gobj = Item_80268B18(&spawn)

what_changed.text: Moved Item* ip and itPikachuthunderAttributes* attrs into the item_gobj != NULL block as local declarations initialized at their first use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item* ip = GET_ITEM(item_gobj); itPikachuthunderAttributes* attrs = ip->xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes

what_changed.text: PR body reports .text for main/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder improved from 99.36059% to 99.54926%, and it_802B1DF8 improved from 97.5% to 98.27586%, with function size remaining 464/464 bytes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Matching section
text_corpus issue_comment: bot report shows it_802B1DF8 +4 bytes, 97.50% to 98.28%

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR narrowly scoped to local variable lifetime/order in one function instead of mixing in unrelated item or data edits.
evidence_refs: changed_files: one changed file
pr_body: This only adjusts local variable lifetimes/order

smart_moves.text: Reported narrow verification commands for the touched object and objdiff unit.
evidence_refs: pr_body: ninja build/GALE01/src/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.o
pr_body: objdiff-cli diff -p . -u main/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder

smart_moves.text: Preserved source behavior intent by limiting edits to declaration placement and assignment shape, with no visible control-flow or data-structure changes in the diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: pr_body: No behavior change is intended
raw_diff: only declaration and local initialization placement changes shown

decomp_lessons.lesson: For MWCC matching, local variable declaration order and lifetime can affect codegen enough to improve an unmatched function without changing function size or intended behavior.
evidence_refs: pr_body: only adjusts local variable lifetimes/order
pr_body: function size remains 464/464 bytes
raw_diff: local declarations moved between function and block scope

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a loop-created object is referenced across several nearby branches, hoisting the object pointer declaration to function scope may produce a better match than declaring it inside the loop body.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item_GObj* item_gobj moved from loop-local declaration to function-scope declaration with assignment in loop
pr_body: matching improvement for it_802B1DF8

decomp_lessons.lesson: Conversely, dependent locals such as GET_ITEM results and attribute pointers may match better when declared at first use inside the guarded block that needs them.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ip and attrs moved from function scope to declarations inside item_gobj != NULL
pr_body: local variable lifetimes/order improved match

naming_conventions.name: item_gobj
naming_conventions.convention: Use item_gobj for a local Item_GObj* when the role is an item object pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item_GObj* item_gobj

naming_conventions.name: ip
naming_conventions.convention: Use ip as a short local name for Item* recovered from GET_ITEM when the role is clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item* ip = GET_ITEM(item_gobj)

naming_conventions.name: attrs
naming_conventions.convention: Use attrs for a local pointer to item-specific attributes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itPikachuthunderAttributes* attrs = ip->xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust function-scope local declaration order to influence stack/register lifetime without changing visible behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: declaration order changed around SpawnItem spawn, _pad, x40, first, item_gobj, cur_delay, prev, i
pr_body: only adjusts local variable lifetimes/order
assembly_or_matching_tactics.reported_result: .text improved from 99.36059% to 99.54926%; it_802B1DF8 improved from 97.5% to 98.27586%; function size stayed 464/464 bytes.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use block-scope declarations for locals whose values are only needed under a NULL guard.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ip and attrs declared inside if (item_gobj != NULL)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.reported_result: Part of the reported matching improvement; PR does not isolate this edit's individual effect.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Keep explicit narrow verification commands in the PR body for local matching changes.
evidence_refs: pr_body: ninja build/GALE01/src/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.o
pr_body: objdiff-cli diff -p . -u main/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder
assembly_or_matching_tactics.reported_result: Verification commands were listed, but loaded evidence does not include command output logs.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local declaration lifetime/order can be a narrow MWCC matching lever
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2458, it_802B1DF8 in src/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.c improved after only local variable lifetime/order changes: item_gobj was hoisted to function scope, while ip and attrs were moved to first use inside the non-NULL block. The PR reported .text improvement for main/melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder and function similarity improvement while function size stayed 464/464 bytes.
evidence_refs: pr_body: This only adjusts local variable lifetimes/order
raw_diff: item_gobj, ip, attrs declaration placement changes
pr_body: function size remains 464/464 bytes

rejection_notes: Do not infer broad reviewer preference from this PR; no review comments are loaded.
Do not promote a rule that item_gobj should always be function-scoped; the evidence is limited to one Pikachu Thunder spawn function and one reported matching improvement.
Do not claim verified behavior equivalence beyond the author's 'No behavior change is intended' statement and reported build/objdiff commands.
No new global naming standard is warranted from this slice alone; local names item_gobj, ip, and attrs are only weakly reusable conventions.
